- Left: blue square in charcoal frame (c)
- Center: gray bar with blue border
- Bottom-center: blue square in frame that's currently G (dark gray)

I think the goal might be to change all three blue square frames from c (charcoal) to G (dark gray). The bottom one is already G. I need to activate the other two.

- Player (after last UP): row 40-43, col 32-35
The player is directly below the bottom blue square, aligned in columns. Maybe the color change happens when the player is vertically aligned with a blue square.
